overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character with blue hair and neon leg warmers walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character traverses pedestrian plazas, sidewalks under holographic billboards, a purple-lit underpass, and finally stops at a crosswalk to wait for futuristic traffic. The environment features intense neon lighting, wet reflective surfaces, and cyberpunk architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian plaza with zebra crossing patterns

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the pedestrian plaza with neon storefronts on the left

entered.detail: bright pink and cyan neon-lit shop fronts with glowing signage
alternating white and dark tiles forming pedestrian crossing patterns on ground
massive illuminated screen displaying colorful advertisements ahead
futuristic yellow information booth with holographic displays

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open pedestrian plaza illuminated by vibrant neon storefronts on the left. The ground features distinctive white zebra crossing patterns, while a large digital billboard glows in the distance ahead. Other pedestrians are scattered throughout the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with wall-mounted digital advertisements

events.description: transitioning from open plaza to street sidewalk with large wall billboards

agents.ego_description: walking past large digital billboards and advertisements mounted on building walls

entered.detail: large glowing digital posters and billboards mounted on the building wall
smooth concrete pedestrian walkway along the street

segments.scene_description: Moving from the plaza onto a street sidewalk, the character passes large digital advertisements covering the building walls on the right. The neon storefronts recede into the distance on the left as sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under overpass with purple neon wall lighting

events.description: entering underpass area with intense magenta and purple neon illumination on walls
approaching tunnel exit with bright sunlight visible ahead creating contrast

agents.ego_description: walking through the tunnel-like underpass with purple neon lights reflecting on the walls

entered.detail: concrete walls illuminated with intense magenta and purple neon lighting
massive concrete overpass structure forming a roof over the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character enters a covered walkway beneath an overpass, where the walls are bathed in intense purple and magenta neon light. The concrete structure looms overhead while ahead, bright sunlight marks the tunnel exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection crosswalk with yellow stripes under elevated highway

events.description: character stops at crosswalk to wait for passing traffic
futuristic sports cars and vehicles drive past on the cross street

agents.ego_description: standing at the crosswalk waiting for vehicles to pass, watching futuristic traffic

notable_agents.action: futuristic sports car driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: broad yellow and black striped pedestrian crossing markings on asphalt

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel, the character stops at a yellow-striped crosswalk under an elevated highway. The lighting shifts to a mix of neon and natural sunset glow in the distance. Futuristic vehicles drive past as the character waits alongside other pedestrians.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant neon-lit city center that transitions from an open plaza into a confined underpass before emerging at a busy urban crossing. It begins by trailing the character through a wide pedestrian plaza filled with glowing storefronts and white zebra patterns, moving steadily toward a distant digital billboard. As the character shifts onto a street sidewalk, the open plaza recedes and the view is dominated by massive digital advertisements clinging to the building walls on the right. The scene then narrows as the character enters a covered walkway, where the environment is bathed in intense purple and magenta neon light beneath a heavy concrete overpass. Finally, the camera follows the character out of the tunnel and into a mix of neon and sunset glow, coming to a halt at a yellow-striped crosswalk as futuristic vehicles stream past.
